title: Add duplicate id checks and fix temp file naming
description:
Two store/validate items from the audit:

1. **Duplicate id checks** — validate.ts checks for duplicate task and issue ids, but does NOT check for duplicate handoff, claim, prompt, or message ids. Add duplicate id detection for all record types (spec §18).

2. **Temp file naming** — store.ts:writeJsonAtomic used Math.random() for temp file suffixes. Replaced with an ascending module-level counter (`tempFileCounter`) combined with `process.pid` for uniqueness. Simpler and sufficient since temp files are only used within a single process for atomic writes.
acceptance: writeJsonAtomic uses an ascending counter (not Math.random()) for temp file suffixes.
notes: Found during code audit on 2026-07-06. Spec §18 requires duplicate ID detection across all record types. Spec §12 requires atomic writes; the ascending counter satisfies this since temp files are process-local and the rename is atomic.
